2.sql: SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and municipality geometry

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) intersecting the municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons (flomareal) intersecting the municipality extent

5.description: filter parcels that intersect the reduced stormflohavniva 200-year polygons

6.description: from parcels intersecting stormflohavniva, keep those that also intersect reduced flomsoner 200-year polygons

7.description: select teigid and kommunenummer from resulting parcels

8.description: deduplicate to one row per teigid
